content.purpose: Provide a DID-addressed core-banking service (account + double-entry ledger + transfer) as an auditable, open-source reference implementation.

architectureDescriptionContext.mission: Provide tamper-evident, DID-native banking primitives open to any AT Protocol client.

content.findings: MVP proven. Balance-by-derivation eliminates stored-balance race; D1 batch() guarantees atomic double-entry.
content.recommendations: Step-up WebAuthn on large transfers (driven by DMN requireStepUp output). Add sanctions screening service task before Task_Settle.
